title: Pronayon Web Apps - Full-Stack Project Management Portal
problem: Pronayon needed a centralized web platform to manage projects, services, and clients efficiently. Manual processes led to delays and lack of transparency.
solution: Built a full-stack admin dashboard with CRUD operations, JWT authentication via Next-Auth, role-based access control, and dynamic category filtering with responsive design.
impact: Centralized project management with real-time updates, role-based access, and automated workflows.

title: IT Asset & Inventory Management System
problem: Manual inventory tracking caused frequent stockouts, procurement delays, and lack of visibility into IT asset lifecycle.
solution: Developed a full-stack IT asset management system using Django DRF backend with Next.js frontend, featuring automated inventory tracking, procurement workflows, and 20+ analytics reports with Chart.js.
impact: 30% reduction in stockouts, 40% faster procurement, and comprehensive analytics dashboard.

title: Stock Price Prediction with Machine Learning
problem: Manual stock market analysis for the Dhaka Stock Exchange was time-consuming, inaccurate, and inaccessible to average traders.
solution: Developed LSTM and XGBoost models achieving 8.2% MAPE accuracy, automated EDA pipelines with 30+ visualizations, FastAPI backend with <500ms prediction latency, and Next.js dashboard with Chart.js.
impact: Enabled traders to forecast 15-day trends with AI accuracy, reducing manual analysis time by 65%.

title: E-Commerce Platform with Admin Dashboard
problem: Watch store needed an online presence with order management, payment processing, and admin controls.
solution: Built a full MERN stack e-commerce platform with JWT authentication, admin CRUD portal, payment integration, and responsive mobile-optimized UI.
impact: Complete e-commerce solution with order tracking, admin portal, and payment processing.

title: Django Blog Platform
problem: Needed a personal blog platform with user authentication and content management.
solution: Developed a full-featured blog platform with Django, SQLite, JWT authentication, rich-text editing, CRUD operations, and optimized queries reducing load times by 40%.
impact: Full-featured blog platform with 100% test coverage for core authentication flows.
